content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market opens with Nifty -0.29%, India VIX elevated at 18.30, and weak US cues (Dow -1.13%). However, multiple held names are gapping up strongly on Q4 catalysts (ADANIPORTS +5.15%, HAL +5.09%, ANANTRAJ +4.82%, BANDHANBNK +3.5%) suggesting stock-specific strength despite index weakness. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners; new entries should be limited given binary-event clusters next week (BAJAJ-AUTO May 6, CESC May 6, ANANTRAJ May 11, GESHIP/HAL May 14).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.9%, trail mandate (b) applies but stored SL 1025 is already above entry 984 (breakeven+ already locked, ~1.6% trail-gap from CMP 1042.20 — within 1% floor discipline). Keeping SL at 1025 (no change) but tightening target slightly to 1100 from 1110 to reflect proximity to 52w high resistance at 1136 and crowded resistance band 1069-1086. Actually — stored SL=1025, new=1025, target stored 1110→ new 1100 — this is a target-only modify. R:R from CMP: (1100-1042.20)/(1042.20-1025) = 57.8/17.2 = 3.4x remaining."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.2%, CMP 122.38 above SL 119 with adequate buffer (~2.8%). MACD bearish crossover but SMA200 well below price (107.26). Defensive geopolitical hedge thesis intact (Iran/Middle East tensions persist). No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 already at breakeven+ (entry 23.65, CMP 24.05). Trail-gap = (24.05-23.85)/24.05 = 0.83% — TOO TIGHT, below 1% floor. Per Rule 12(c), this is self-stopout territory. Loosening would be rejected by guardrails (SL can only tighten). Therefore HOLD instead of MODIFY — issuing as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior entry: stored SL 23.85 is 0.83% below CMP — already tight, cannot loosen per guardrails. Holding as-is; if PHARMABEES retreats slightly, SL will fire near breakeven which is acceptable for a low-conviction ETF position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1715 already above entry 1700. CMP 1742.60. Trail-gap = (1742.60-1715)/1742.60 = 1.58% — within discipline. Keeping SL at 1715 (no-op SL, but note: stored values match — should be HOLD instead). Re-issuing as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1715 and target 1780 unchanged from stored values — emitting HOLD per no-op rule. Q4 strong (rev +26%, PAT +9.4%, dividend Rs 7.5), institutional Capital Group block deal. Position approaching original target 1780 with SL locked above entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "new_target": 1600.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1510, target 1600 unchanged — no-op MODIFY. Re-emit as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL/target unchanged. NOTE: GESHIP board meeting May 14 (FY26 results + dividend) — 7 trading sessions away, OUTSIDE the 3-session binary window, no action required yet. Will re-evaluate ~May 11. CMP 1536.80 vs entry 1542, P&L -0.3%, SL 1510 (~1.7% buffer). Tanker rates elevated, fleet expansion. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.7%, CMP 13580 vs SL 13400 (1.3% buffer), today gapping up +2%. Record April sales +33% YoY. Q4 PAT -6.9% margin pressure noted but volume momentum strong. Hold — no SL tighten warranted at -1.7% P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.2% at CMP 206.76, gapping up +3.52% on Bengal political catalyst. SL 204 (~1.3% buffer). Q4 PAT +68% YoY, brokerages raised targets. Hold; if pre-open strength holds and breaks 209 entry, will trail SL on next tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, CMP 4559.50 vs SL 4480 (1.7% buffer). Pre-market gap +5.09% to 4559, defence rally + Tejas Mk1A delivery catalyst. Q4 results May 14 (7 trading sessions away — OUTSIDE 3-session binary window, no event-trim required yet). Will reassess ~May 11. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 504.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 504, target 540 unchanged — no-op MODIFY. Re-emit as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL/target unchanged, no-op. Position +1.2%. CRITICAL: Q4 results May 11 = 4 trading sessions away (outside 3-session window TODAY but enters window May 6). Per Rule 11, plan to EXIT or risk-trim by May 6 close. Additionally, ED PMLA raid Apr 24 is a live governance overhang. Today: hold; flagged to revisit May 6 for binary-event disposition decision."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +4.2% above entry — solid breakeven+ lock. Trail-gap 1.6% acceptable. Watching for break above 1069 to consider tightening further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, P&L -2.2%, SL has 2.8% buffer. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already 0.83% below CMP — at the discipline floor. Cannot loosen, won't tighten further. Let it run or stop near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 above entry 1700 = locked breakeven+. Approaching target 1780 with 5.15% gap-up today. May tighten further intraday if it prints fresh ATH."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting May 14 (7 sessions out, outside binary window). Re-evaluate ~May 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater -1.7%, no trail warranted. SL 13400 has 1.3% buffer; pre-market gap +2% supportive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market +3.5% gap on political catalyst pushes position toward breakeven. If it holds entry 209, will trail SL on next tick."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 14 (7 sessions out, outside binary window). Pre-market +5% gap. Re-evaluate ~May 11 for event disposition."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 11 = enters 3-session window on May 6. Plan to EXIT or trim by close May 6 per binary-event rule. ED PMLA overhang adds governance tail risk."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL Q4 net +155% YoY, lifetime high — but P/E ~224 and parabolic 62% one-month move = textbook chase risk; pass. BAJAJ-AUTO Q4 + buyback decision May 6 (1 trading session away) = inside binary window, no new full-size entry permitted; would only qualify as event-trade ≤5% capital at conf ≥0.70 — confidence not at that bar today. CESC board meeting May 6 (1 session away) — same binary disqualification. LAURUSLABS strong Q4 + 62x forward valuation, MACD bearish crossover on daily — pass. ADANIGREEN debt jumped 42% YoY, interest = 46% of revenue — leverage red flag, pass despite price momentum. VEDL demerger transition = price discovery noise, MACD bearish crossover, pass. SYNGENE/MOTILALOFS/HFCL/FLUOROCHEM/LALPATHLAB — interesting volume signals but no Q4 catalyst data confirmed; will re-screen in subsequent ticks. Pre-market is a thin data window — most technicals show 0.0 RSI/ADX (stale). Will re-assess at 9:30+ once cash open prints land.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 47%, well within soft-target — room to add 1-2 quality entries today IF setups clear bar after open. Book is heavily long, broad-based across financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), services/ports (ADANIPORTS, GESHIP), auto (MARUTI), defence (HAL), realty (ANANTRAJ), pharma (PHARMABEES), gold (GOLDBEES). No single-cluster overconcentration. Multiple binary events clustered May 6-14 (BAJAJ-AUTO 6, CESC 6, ANANTRAJ 11, GESHIP 14, HAL 14) — will need to manage event-by-event. Pre-market gap-ups across ADANIPORTS/HAL/ANANTRAJ/BANDHANBNK suggest unrealized P&L will improve on cash open, creating clearer trail-SL opportunities at 9:30+. India VIX 18.30 elevated — normal sizing, no fresh aggressive adds today."
}
